title: Garden work with Linux — blooms, plants & irrigation
description: A little bit of everything in the garden: Linux on site, hydrangeas blooming after planting, 185+ plants installed in two weeks, and about 50 irrigation lines repaired.

title: Landscape build — hyperlapse
description: Yard transformation in fast-forward — beds, mulch, edges, plantings, all in a few minutes.

title: Linux supervising, aka napping
description: Site supervisor Linux on the clock. Eyes closed, but on duty.

title: Hydrangea install — Linux supervising
description: Hydrangeas going in, with Linux on quality control.

title: Pruning + brush prepped for City of Charlotte pickup
description: Example of pruning and cleanup done right — brush separated into piles no longer than 5 feet long and 3 feet high, with at least 2 feet between piles, ready for City of Charlotte yard waste pickup.

title: 10+ yards of mulch — South Park, Charlotte
description: Me and Linux dropping over 10 yards of natural mulch in South Park, Charlotte.

title: Custom Treehouse Build
description: A one-of-a-kind treehouse, built by hand on-site.

title: Why we don't use chemical weed killer
description: What's actually in commercial weed killers — and why we choose natural alternatives on every job.

title: Retaining wall rock work — Linux on site
description: A retaining-wall rock job in progress, with Linux supervising and a little singing/howling between the hyperlapses.

title: Pressure washing pavers — Before
description: Before: weather-stained pavers. The grime hides the color underneath.

title: Pressure washing pavers — After
description: After: same pavers, color and crisp lines back. Years of weather lifted off.
